transcript_facts:
* The patient reports fatigue, particularly at the end of the day.
* The patient rides his bike 20 to 30 miles.
* The patient’s alkaline phosphatase level is elevated at 156.
* The clinician orders an echocardiogram.
* The clinician orders a stress test.
* The clinician recommends a referral to cardiology with Dr. Vincent Sanchez.
* The clinician observes pursed lip breathing and low exhalation.
* The clinician orders pulmonary function testing.
* The clinician orders an ultrasound of the right testicular nodule.
* The patient has received both doses of the COVID-19 vaccine.
* The patient’s wife has noticed pursed lip breathing.
